name: outage-atlas
description: National, location-first US power-outage atlas: a free ODIN+NWS baseline for every location plus on-demand deep per-utility detail. Self-maintained by embedded agents behind copious audit gates.

scripts.test: node scripts/test_adapters.mjs && node scripts/validate_configs.mjs && node scripts/test_geo.mjs && node scripts/audit_csp.mjs
